title: Cryptographic key generation should be based on strong parameters
description: Ensures that cryptographic key generation functions use strong parameters.
message: Cryptographic key generation should be based on strong parameters.
impact: Security vulnerabilities can be introduced by weak key generation.
recommendation: Use OS-provided functions for key generation.

noncompliant.code:
from rsa import newkeys
key = newkeys.newkeys(64, 64)
noncompliant.description: Weak key size (64 bits public and private key)

compliant.code:
from rsa import newkeys
key = newkeys.newkeys(2048, 2048)
compliant.description: Strong key size (2048 bits public and private key)

why_is_this_an_issue: Weak keys are more susceptible to attacks.
